data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: UI elements are optimized for ease of access and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Strategically positioned search bar and buttons for quick user access.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Design prioritizes reduction of user choice complexity.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist interface with focus on primary actions like search.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Logical grouping of related content for intuitive navigation.
data.technical_spec: Visual grouping through subtle UI elements on landing pages.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Consistency across Google products to enhance user familiarity.
data.technical_spec: Unified design language for seamless transitions.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focus on key features that drive the majority of user engagement.
data.technical_spec: Search functionality prioritized to serve 80% user needs.
